name: Menki

skills.name: Dream-eating
skills.description: Gains Mass when using skills. Mass increases his Physical Attack, Physical Defense, and Magical Defense.

skills.name: Lingering Dream
skills.description:
Gains Mass and a shield while damaging enemies within range.
Basic Attack hits reduce this skill's cooldown.

skills.name: Dream Bubble
skills.description:
Throws a bubble in the target direction, then pulls it back. He does this twice.
The bubble damages and slows enemies hit.
The bubble can be thrown again as a bomb in the target direction, damaging enemies.

skills.name: Dream Roam
skills.description: Flies in a circle, dealing magical damage to enemies in his path while gaining Mass. When he stops flying, he launches and damages nearby enemies.

skillsZh.name: 食夢
skillsZh.description: 夢奇施放技能會獲得質量，提升物理攻擊、物理防禦和法術防禦。

skillsZh.name: 夢境縈繞
skillsZh.description:
夢奇獲得護盾值，增加質量，對周圍一定範圍內敵人造成傷害。
普攻命中敵人會減少【夢境縈繞】的冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 夢力泡泡
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向扔出泡泡後回收，再次向面朝方向扔出後接住。
泡泡會對命中敵人造成傷害和減速效果。
隨後可再次朝指定方向扔出泡泡，對敵人造成傷害。

skillsZh.name: 夢境環遊
skillsZh.description: 夢奇進行一次夢境環遊，對路徑上的敵人造成法術傷害，並持續獲得質量，環遊停止時擊飛並傷害周圍敵人。

tips: Build: Sparkforged Dagger, Blazing Cape, Blood Rage.
tipsZh: 夢奇（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 51.58%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：閃電匕首、紅蓮斗篷、血魔之怒.

patchHistory.detail: Menki can't speak, but we all know it wants to become even stronger.
"We're making Menki's stats match up better with his Mass."

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「雖然夢奇不說，我們都知道夢奇想在王者峽谷裡表現得更好。」
讓夢奇的屬性更加符合他的質量。

faqs.question: Is Menki good in current season?
faqs.answer: Menki is Tier B Mage with 51.58% win rate, 0.22% pick rate, and 0.02% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Menki build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Sparkforged Dagger, Blazing Cape, Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Ravage - Phantom.

faqs.question: How to counter Menki?
faqs.answer: Pick Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi. Strong into Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao.

faqsZh.question: 夢奇 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 夢奇 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.58%、選取 0.22%、禁用 0.02%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 夢奇 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：閃電匕首、紅蓮斗篷、血魔之怒、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、侵略・怒魂.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 夢奇？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Ming、Sima Yi、Zhuangzi。夢奇 克制 Lady Zhen、Mai Shiranui、Xiao Qiao。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao. Weak into: Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Lady Zhen、Mai Shiranui、Xiao Qiao；被克制：Ming、Sima Yi、Zhuangzi

guide.overview: Menki is a Medium Mage (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.7% win rate and 0.2% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Menki: Gains Mass when using skills.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Giant's Grip, Boots of Resistance, Shadow Ripper, then complete Blazing Cape, Pure Sky, Blood Rage. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Menki's Mage kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Lingering Dream → Dream Bubble → Dream Roam → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Dream Roam (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Dream Bubble provides mobility or stick—max first. Lingering Dream second for damage. Dream Roam on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Lingering Dream → Dream Bubble → Dream Roam → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Dream Roam after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Poke from max range before objective. Save hard CC for enemy dive or your carry peel window.
guide.highRank: Menki sits at Tier B globally (51.7% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Menki vs Daji (Mage, Tier S+): Daji is 2.4% pick / 51.0% WR. Menki has +0.6% WR vs Daji in Camp data. Choose Menki when you need Jungling identity; choose Daji for Mid Lane comfort.
Menki vs Angela (Mage, Tier S+): Angela is 2.3% pick / 51.8% WR. Angela wins 0.1% more often globally. Choose Menki when you need Jungling identity; choose Angela for Mid Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Menki excels into Lady Zhen, Mai Shiranui, Xiao Qiao. Avoid blind picking into Ming, Sima Yi, Zhuangzi without team peel.
